channel.title: GNtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Two Human Embryo Editing Startups Shut Down Amid Industry Turmoil
item.description: Bootstrap Bio and Manhattan Genomics, both pursuing embryo editing to prevent serious hereditary disease, have ceased operations.

item.title: Efforts to Renew Key US Surveillance Authority Face Continued Legislative Complications
item.description: A federal surveillance program that allows warrantless access to Americans' communications is up for renewal, with a new bill attempting to address longstanding legal objections.

item.title: Google Plans Investment of Up to $40 Billion in AI Company Anthropic
item.description: Google is planning an investment of up to $40 billion in Anthropic, combining cash and computing resources as competition among AI developers intensifies.

item.title: X Releases Standalone XChat Messaging App for iOS
item.description: X's new standalone messaging application for iOS offers private chats, disappearing messages, and audio and video calling features.

item.title: DeepMind Spinoff Isomorphic Labs Advances AI-Designed Drugs to Human Trials
item.description: Isomorphic Labs president Max Jaderberg announced the company has developed a pipeline of AI-designed drug candidates moving toward human clinical trials.
